meta_description: Stay at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord – comfortable rooms, restaurant and hotelbar, group-friendly facilities, parking, and convenient access to Düsseldorf city centre.
hero_subtitle: Comfortable Stays. Smart Travel. Discover Düsseldorf with Sunday.
hero_slide2_desc: Double rooms for single or double occupancy with free Wi-Fi, workspace and modern bathrooms.
hero_slide3_desc: Enjoy breakfast, regional and international cuisine, and relaxed evening drinks.
quote_text: Modern comfort, smart connections and relaxed hospitality in Düsseldorf City Nord.
discover_title: A Smart Stay in Düsseldorf City Nord
discover_desc: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord offers a welcoming and comfortable stay for business and leisure travellers. With excellent transport connections, the hotel provides easy access to Messe Düsseldorf, the airport, city centre, PSD Bank Dome and major local attractions.
accommodation_title: Comfortable Rooms for Work and Rest
accommodation_desc: The hotel features 190 comfortable non-smoking rooms, all designed as double rooms for single or double occupancy. Guests enjoy free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, a large workspace desk by the window and modern bathroom facilities.
wellness_desc: Start the day with a rich continental breakfast buffet featuring hot and cold selections. The restaurant serves relaxed international and regional cuisine, while the hotel bar and garden terrace offer the perfect place to unwind.
about_page_title: About Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
about_meta_description: Discover Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord – a modern 4-star hotel for business and leisure travellers with comfortable rooms, dining, meeting facilities, parking and excellent Düsseldorf connections.
about_hero_desc: Comfortable stays, smart travel and easy access to Düsseldorf.
about_nature_title: A Modern Hotel for Business & Leisure
about_nature_desc: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord offers a welcoming and comfortable stay for both business and leisure travellers. Conveniently located with excellent transport connections, the hotel is ideal for work trips, city breaks, group stays and stopovers.
about_guest_desc: Guests can enjoy spacious accommodation, dining options and personalised hospitality in a relaxed atmosphere. The hotel features 190 comfortable non-smoking rooms, a restaurant, hotel bar, garden terrace and a spacious garage with 90 parking places.
about_location_desc: Located in Düsseldorf, the hotel offers perfect access to Messe Düsseldorf, Esprit Arena, Düsseldorf Airport, the city centre and PSD Bank Dome by car and public transport.
about_why2: Convenient for airport and transit guests
about_why3: Ideal for business travellers and groups
about_why4: Easy access by car and public transport
about_values_title: Everything for a Comfortable Düsseldorf Stay
about_val1_desc: Non-smoking double rooms for single or double occupancy with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, workspace desk and modern bathroom amenities.
about_val2_desc: Enjoy international and regional cuisine, a rich continental breakfast buffet, comfortable bar lounge and garden terrace.
about_val3_desc: Six flexible facilities for small and large meetings, group stays, coach tours and corporate events with tailored catering options.
about_val4_desc: Small dogs are welcome at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord for a charge of €12.00 per dog per night.
contact_page_title: Contact Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
contact_meta_description: Contact Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord for bookings, group enquiries, meetings, dining, parking information and comfortable stays in Düsseldorf.
contact_desc: Plan your stay at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord.
contact_travel: Travel to Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
contact_train_desc: The hotel offers convenient access to Düsseldorf city centre, Messe Düsseldorf, PSD Bank Dome and other key destinations by public transport.
contact_car_desc: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord is easy to reach by car and offers a spacious garage with 90 parking places for hotel guests.
contact_air_desc: Düsseldorf Airport is easily accessible from the hotel, making it ideal for business travellers, groups and transit guests.
ta_page_title: Explore Düsseldorf | Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
ta_meta_description: Discover Düsseldorf attractions near Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord including the city centre, Old Town, Rhein Tower, Banks of the Rhine, Königsallee and Gehry Bauten.
ta_desc: Discover city highlights and nearby attractions from Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord.
ta_overview_desc: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord is a convenient base for exploring Düsseldorf’s most popular attractions. From the city centre and Old Town to the Rhein Tower, the banks of the Rhine, Königsallee and Gehry Bauten, guests can enjoy culture, shopping, architecture and riverside views with easy access from the hotel.
ta_attr1_desc: Explore Düsseldorf’s lively city centre with shopping, dining, business districts and cultural experiences.
ta_attr2_desc: Discover Düsseldorf’s famous Old Town with traditional streets, restaurants, bars and historic charm.
ta_attr3_desc: Enjoy panoramic views over Düsseldorf and the Rhine from one of the city’s most recognisable landmarks.
ta_attr4_desc: Walk along the Rhine promenade and enjoy riverside views, cafés, architecture and a relaxed city atmosphere.
ta_attr5_desc: Visit Düsseldorf’s elegant shopping boulevard, known for luxury boutiques, cafés and its scenic canal.
ta_attr6_desc: See the iconic Gehry buildings in Düsseldorf’s Media Harbour, a highlight for architecture lovers.
ta_cta_desc: Stay close to Düsseldorf highlights with comfortable rooms, dining, parking and excellent transport connections.

gallery_meta_description: Explore the photo gallery of Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord including the hotel exterior, reception, guest rooms, restaurant, breakfast buffet, lounge, meeting facilities and Düsseldorf city highlights.

rooms_page_title: Rooms | Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
rooms_meta: Comfortable rooms at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord including Standard Single, Standard Double, Twin, Superior and Family Rooms with free Wi-Fi, workspace desk and modern bathroom amenities.
rooms_desc: Comfortable rooms for business, leisure and transit stays
rooms_text: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord offers 190 comfortable non-smoking rooms. All rooms are double rooms for single or double occupancy and include free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, a large workspace desk by the window and modern bathroom facilities with large shower, hairdryer, vanity mirror and heat lamp.
room_standard_single_desc: Comfortable room for single occupancy with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, workspace desk and modern bathroom amenities.
room_standard_double_desc: A comfortable double room for one or two guests, ideal for business trips, city breaks and short stays in Düsseldorf.
room_twin_desc: Practical twin accommodation with comfortable bedding, workspace, free Wi-Fi and modern bathroom facilities.
room_superior_desc: Enhanced comfort for guests who want extra space, a relaxed atmosphere and convenient in-room amenities.
room_family_desc: Comfortable accommodation for families with flexible space, free Wi-Fi and pet-friendly options available.
rooms_dog_desc1: Small dogs are welcome at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord, making the hotel a convenient choice for guests travelling with pets.
rooms_dog_desc2: A charge of €12.00 per dog per night applies. Please inform the hotel in advance when travelling with your dog so the team can prepare your stay.
cta_desc: Enjoy a comfortable stay with smart access to Düsseldorf city centre, Messe Düsseldorf, the airport, PSD Bank Dome and nearby attractions.
gastro_page_title: Dining | Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
gastro_meta_description: Enjoy relaxed dining at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord with international and regional cuisine, a rich continental breakfast buffet, hotel bar and garden terrace.
gastro_desc: Restaurant, breakfast, hotel bar and garden terrace in Düsseldorf.
gastro_overview_desc: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord offers a relaxed and welcoming restaurant with international and regional cuisine, suitable for individual guests, business travellers and group dining experiences. Guests can also enjoy a comfortable hotel bar, lounge area and garden terrace.
gastro_rest1_desc: Start your day with a rich continental breakfast buffet served daily, featuring hot and cold selections for a comfortable morning before work, travel or sightseeing.
gastro_rest2_desc: The hotel restaurant offers a relaxed dining experience with international and regional cuisine, ideal for both individual guests and group dining.
gastro_rest3_desc: A comfortable lounge and bar area provides the perfect place for evening drinks after meetings, travel or a day exploring Düsseldorf.
gastro_rest4_desc: Enjoy a relaxed outdoor atmosphere on the garden terrace, perfect for a quiet break, casual conversations and seasonal moments.
gastro_rest5_desc: The restaurant is suitable for group dining experiences, coach tours, corporate stays and event guests, with tailored catering solutions available upon request.
gastro_cta_desc: Contact Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord for restaurant details, group dining or tailored catering requests.
group_meta_title: Group Stays | Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord
group_meta_description: Group stays at Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord with 190 comfortable rooms, meeting facilities, dining, parking and excellent access to Düsseldorf city centre, airport and Messe Düsseldorf.
group_hero_text: Smart accommodation for groups, coach tours and corporate travellers.
group_overview_title: Ideal for Group Travel in Düsseldorf
group_overview_text: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord is a convenient choice for groups, coach tours, business travellers and transit guests. With 190 comfortable non-smoking rooms, excellent transport connections, restaurant facilities, a hotel bar, garden terrace and spacious garage parking, the hotel offers everything needed for an easy and comfortable group stay in Düsseldorf.
group_card1_text: Non-smoking double rooms for single or double occupancy with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, workspace desk and modern bathroom amenities.
group_card2_text: A relaxed restaurant for international and regional cuisine, group dining experiences and a rich continental breakfast buffet served daily.
group_card3_text: Six flexible facilities for small and large meetings, corporate events, group stays and coach tours with capacity for up to 120 people.
group_card4_text: A spacious garage with 90 parking places makes arrival convenient for groups, business guests and travellers arriving by car.
group_access1_text: Perfect access to Messe Düsseldorf, Düsseldorf Airport, the city centre, PSD Bank Dome and Esprit Arena by car and public transport.
group_access2_text: Tailored catering and accommodation solutions are available upon request for coach tours, corporate stays and group travel.
group_cta_text: Contact Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord for group enquiries, meetings, catering and accommodation solutions.

events_hero_text: Flexible spaces for meetings, groups and corporate events in Düsseldorf.
events_overview_title: Smart Event Facilities in Düsseldorf City Nord
events_overview_text1: Sunday Hotel Düsseldorf City Nord offers six flexible facilities for small and large meetings, group stays, coach tours and corporate events. With capacity for meetings of up to 120 people, the hotel is a practical choice for business travellers and event organisers.
events_overview_text2: Tailored catering and accommodation solutions are available upon request, supported by comfortable rooms, restaurant facilities, hotel bar, garden terrace and convenient access to Messe Düsseldorf, the airport, city centre and PSD Bank Dome.
events_space1_text: Six adaptable facilities for small and large meetings, seminars, workshops and corporate gatherings.
events_space2_text: Meeting spaces for up to 120 people with flexible layouts and tailored support for your event needs.
events_space3_text: Ideal for group travel, coach tours and corporate stays with accommodation and dining options on site.
events_amenity1_text: Flexible event facilities suitable for small meetings and larger gatherings.
events_amenity2_text: Comfortable non-smoking rooms for single or double occupancy, ideal for business and group stays.
events_amenity3_text: Catering solutions available upon request through the hotel restaurant and dining team.
events_amenity4_text: Spacious garage parking makes arrival convenient for event guests travelling by car.
events_capacity_note: Final setup, catering and accommodation arrangements are available upon request.
events_package2_item1: Suitable for coach tours and group travel
events_package3_item1: Access to Messe Düsseldorf and airport
events_package3_item3: Restaurant, hotel bar and garden terrace
